footer.tagline: Prayer times and Qibla direction with clarity, privacy, and technical rigor.

fallback.notAvailable: This page is not yet available in English.

testerCta.title: Help make prayer times more accurate
testerCta.bodyPara1: I'm building Qibla Now to give Muslims reliable prayer times and Qibla direction — no tracking, no ads, no noise. I need a handful of people to try it in different places and settings and tell me if it works.
testerCta.bodyPara2: If you pray regularly and can install an app once, your feedback matters a lot.
testerCta.primaryLabel: I want to test the app
testerCta.emailAlt: Prefer to reach out by email?
testerCta.microNote: Takes under 2 minutes. No account, no sign-up.
testerCta.mailtoBody: Hi, I'd like to test the app.
